channel.title: 🚀 Ultimate AI Feed - Authority First, Signal Over Noise
channel.description: Top 10 daily: semantic analysis, smart dedup, authority-first, quality over quantity.

item.title: [1] [模型算法] ReqFusion: A Multi-Provider Framework for Automated PEGS Analysis Across Software Domains
item.description:
📊 Score: 166 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • ⭐A-Authority:anthropic(+70)
  • ⭐A-Authority:openai(+70)
  • ❌Industry-Gate:fail(-30)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Requirements engineering is a vital, yet labor-intensive, stage in the software development process. This article introduces ReqFusion: an AI-enhanced system that automates the extraction, classification, and analysis of software requirements utilizing multiple Large Language Model (LLM) providers. The architecture of ReqFusion integrates OpenAI GP...

item.title: [2] [模型算法] FG-Portrait: 3D Flow Guided Editable Portrait Animation
item.description:
📊 Score: 117 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L1-Tech:npu(+40)
  • L3-Tech:diffusion(+15)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Motion transfer from the driving to the source portrait remains a key challenge in the portrait animation. Current diffusion-based approaches condition only on the driving motion, which fails to capture source-to-driving correspondences and consequently yields suboptimal motion transfer. Although flow estimation provides an alternative, predicting ...

item.title: [5] [模型算法] MedObvious: Exposing the Medical Moravec's Paradox in VLMs via Clinical Triage
item.description:
📊 Score: 103 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L1-Tech:npu(+40)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Vision Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly used for tasks like medical report generation and visual question answering. However, fluent diagnostic text does not guarantee safe visual understanding. In clinical practice, interpretation begins with pre-diagnostic sanity checks: verifying that the input is valid to read (correct modality and anato...

item.title: [6] [模型算法] SpecEyes: Accelerating Agentic Multimodal LLMs via Speculative Perception and Planning
item.description:
📊 Score: 103 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • ⭐A-Authority:openai(+70)
  • ❌Industry-Gate:fail(-30)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Agentic multimodal large language models (MLLMs) (e.g., OpenAI o3 and Gemini Agentic Vision) achieve remarkable reasoning capabilities through iterative visual tool invocation. However, the cascaded perception, reasoning, and tool-calling loops introduce significant sequential overhead. This overhead, termed agentic depth, incurs prohibitive latenc...

item.title: [8] [行业动态] Google unveils TurboQuant, a new AI memory compression algorithm — and yes, the internet is calling it ‘Pied Piper’
item.description:
📊 Score: 100 | Category: 行业动态

📡 Source: TechCrunch | Domain: techcrunch.com

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:TechCrunch(+15)
  • ✓A-Domain:techcrunch.com(+30)
  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)
  • real_release

📄 Summary: Google’s TurboQuant has the internet joking about Pied Piper from HBO's "Silicon Valley." The compression algorithm promises to shrink AI’s “working memory” by up to 6x, but it’s still just a lab experiment for now....

item.title: [10] [大V/权威] The AI skills gap is here, says AI company, and power users are pulling ahead
item.description:
📊 Score: 85 | Category: 大V/权威

📡 Source: TechCrunch | Domain: techcrunch.com

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:TechCrunch(+15)
  • ✓A-Domain:techcrunch.com(+30)
  • ⭐A-Authority:anthropic(+70)

📄 Summary: Anthropic finds AI isn’t replacing jobs yet, but early data shows growing inequality as experienced users gain an edge, raising concerns about future displacement and workforce divides....
